johnzfitch/filearchy.desc: Filearchy is a Wayland file manager forked from cosmic-files, enhancing workflows with custom MIME icons, extended archive support, and terminal integration.

johnzfitch/nautilus-plus.desc: Enhanced Nautilus file manager with sub-millisecond search, large animated thumbnail support, and crash prevention features.

johnzfitch/indepacer.desc: CLI tool for querying PACER, enabling case searches, docket downloads, and document retrieval from federal court records.

johnzfitch/claude-cowork-linux.desc: Run Claude Desktop's Cowork mode natively on Linux by reverse-engineering macOS components for direct execution without a VM.

johnzfitch/claude-warden.desc: Security hooks for Claude Code, enabling SSRF protection, token-saving, and observability with OTEL tracing and MCP compression.

johnzfitch/pyghidra-lite.desc: Token-efficient MCP server for Ghidra, enabling analysis of ELF, Mach-O, and PE binaries with Swift, Objective-C, and Hermes support.

johnzfitch/claude-wiki.desc: Comprehensive Anthropic documentation mirror with 2000+ Markdown articles on Claude, covering APIs, SDKs, integrations, and more.

johnzfitch/llmx.desc: Local-first codebase indexer utilizing BM25 and neural embeddings for efficient semantic search and chunk exports in-browser via WebGPU.

johnzfitch/dota.desc: Post-quantum secure secrets manager using hybrid ML-KEM-768 and X25519 encryption with a terminal UI for secure secret management.

johnzfitch/raley-bot.desc: Automated grocery shopping assistant leveraging an API with intelligent unit pricing, coupon clipping, and MCP server integration.

johnzfitch/privacy-toggles.desc: Control outbound telemetry on macOS with a web dashboard and menu bar app, featuring 61 toggles and DNS sinkhole blocking.

johnzfitch/codex-patcher.desc: Automated Rust code patching tool leveraging tree-sitter for syntax-aware modifications and reliable LLM-generated updates.

johnzfitch/htmx-docs.desc: Curated HTMX documentation in Markdown, including API references, Big Sky repos, and relevant RFCs, organized for easy access.
